rulings.Case Title: SPARK CONSTRUCTION, INC. VS. RICHARD BOGAN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO 2ND AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday , March 24, 2010, line 4, CROSS COMPLAINANT RICHARD BOGAN DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO SECOND AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT. Demurrer overruled in part and sustained in part. Demurrer overruled as to 1st and 2nd affirmative defenses. Demurrer sustained with ten days leave to amend as to all other affirmative defenses for cross-defendant to plead factual basis. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: RFJ INC., RFJ MEISWINKEL COMPANY VS. PACIFIC CONSTRUCTION & MANUFACTURING INC et al
